name: Garden Party leather handbag
description:
Recent photos show that the bag's condition matches the pictures. Warehouse number: XXM118. Minor scratches, stains, creases, and dents may exist on the exterior, interior lining, hardware, and bottom edge of the bag. Please refer to the photos for details. All photos were taken in actual conditions and include the included accessories.

Before the bag is shipped, our professional department will provide a free maintenance and cleaning service to ensure it arrives in perfect condition. This includes, but is not limited to, repairing worn areas and polishing the hardware. All services will be completed before shipment. Rest assured, these services will not affect the bag's functionality.

Please note: Due to differences in light and monitors, the color of this item may vary slightly.

If you have any questions or need a quote, please feel free to contact us. Happy shopping!

Hermes Garden Party Peacock Green Garden Bag Dimensions: 36*26*17cm
